title: Decision Log Entry
description: Reusable organizational memory: a decision the human+AI team made. Day 3 (descriptive, provenance-tracked) + Day 5 (version everything). Separates fact/assumption/decision/opinion (Principle #4).

context.description: FACTS + ASSUMPTIONS in play at decision time.

decision.description: What we chose (the DECISION) and why.

consequences.description: Trade-offs accepted; what this makes easier/harder.

supersedes.description: id of a prior decision this replaces, if any.
